title: Call Me Bwana
writer: Nate Monaster, Johanna Harwood, Mort Lachman
actors: Bob Hope, Anita Ekberg, Edie Adams
plot: A returning moon capsule with vital information goes off-course and lands in Africa, where the little-known Ekele tribesmen find it. Washington orders African expert, Matthew Merriwether - an utter fraud and authority only on femi...
